# Stocks Memory

> Build on prior research, not from scratch

## Reuse Prior Analyses and Sources

Always build domain knowledge from prior analyses and their sources before producing new stock research. Review existing stock reports in `Second Brain/Personal/Finances/stocks/` and carry forward relevant insights and links, then update with new data.
